title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Supported devices list)
scenario: Onboarding for Voyager Free 60 Charge Case does not show smart charge case screens when started from supported devices list
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on a mobile device with no Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. On the Home screen, tap the supported devices list or equivalent option to view available devices.
3. From the list, select 'Voyager Free 60 Charge Case' (not the Voyager Free 60+ variant).
4. Begin the onboarding process for the selected device.
5. Observe the screens shown during the onboarding flow.
expected: Smart charge case screens should appear during onboarding for the Voyager Free 60.
